## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] No hex codes added in components (used semantic tokens)
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Changes are focused and minimal
